steps.t: The Easterling captain may be found at their camp, east of Aculf's camp in the Rushgore. Wynstan asked you to take the Easterling relics you found and…
The Easterling captain may be found at their camp, south of the Woodmen's camp in the Rushgore. Wynstan asked you to take the Easterling relics you fo…
Wynstan is at Aculf's camp in the Rushgore, west of the Easterling camp. You should return to Wynstan with Rozi's pledge and warning.
